Experiences

    Fargo, ND | Nov 2024 – Present

    College Station, TX | Feb 2024 – Oct 2024

Education

    Storrs, CT | 2018 – 2024

    Xiamen, China | 2014 – 2017

    Xiamen, China | 2010 – 2014

    2021

    2021

    2020
